Package noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

Interface IDialogImage

  • public interface IDialogImage

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getAlignment()  
      float getAlpha()  
      int getColor()  
      int getHeight()  
      int getId()  
      int getImageType()  
      float getRotation()  
      float getScale()  
      int getSelectedColor()  
      String getTexture()  
      int getTextureX()  
      int getTextureY()  
      int getWidth()  
      int getX()  
      int getY()  
      void setAlignment​(int alignment)
      Sets the alignment of this image.
      void setAlpha​(float alpha)
      Sets the alpha transparency of this image.
      void setColor​(int color)
      Sets the tint color of this image.
      void setImageType​(int imageType)
      Sets the image type which determines where the image is rendered.
      void setPosition​(int x, int y)
      Sets the screen position of this image.
      void setRotation​(float rotation)
      Sets the rotation angle of this image.
      void setScale​(float scale)
      Sets the render scale of this image.
      void setSelectedColor​(int color)
      Sets the tint color used when this image is selected/hovered.
      void setTexture​(String texture)
      Sets the texture resource location for this image.
      void setTextureOffset​(int offsetX, int offsetY)
      Sets the texture UV offset for this image.
      void setWidthHeight​(int width, int height)
      Sets the rendered width and height of this image.

    • Method Detail

      • getId

        int getId()
        Returns:
        The unique ID of this dialog image

      • setTexture

        void setTexture​(String texture)
        Sets the texture resource location for this image.
        Parameters:
        texture - The resource location string

      • getTexture

        String getTexture()
        Returns:
        The texture resource location for this image

      • setPosition

        void setPosition​(int x,
                 int y)
        Sets the screen position of this image.
        Parameters:
        x - The X position in pixels
        y - The Y position in pixels

      • getX

        int getX()
        Returns:
        The X position of this image in pixels

      • getY

        int getY()
        Returns:
        The Y position of this image in pixels

      • setWidthHeight

        void setWidthHeight​(int width,
                    int height)
        Sets the rendered width and height of this image.
        Parameters:
        width - The width in pixels
        height - The height in pixels

      • getWidth

        int getWidth()
        Returns:
        The rendered width of this image in pixels

      • getHeight

        int getHeight()
        Returns:
        The rendered height of this image in pixels

      • setTextureOffset

        void setTextureOffset​(int offsetX,
                      int offsetY)
        Sets the texture UV offset for this image.
        Parameters:
        offsetX - The horizontal texture offset in pixels
        offsetY - The vertical texture offset in pixels

      • getTextureX

        int getTextureX()
        Returns:
        The horizontal texture UV offset in pixels

      • getTextureY

        int getTextureY()
        Returns:
        The vertical texture UV offset in pixels

      • setColor

        void setColor​(int color)
        Sets the tint color of this image.
        Parameters:
        color - The color as an integer (e.g. 0xFFFFFF)

      • getColor

        int getColor()
        Returns:
        The tint color of this image

      • setSelectedColor

        void setSelectedColor​(int color)
        Sets the tint color used when this image is selected/hovered.
        Parameters:
        color - The selected color as an integer (e.g. 0xFFFFFF)

      • getSelectedColor

        int getSelectedColor()
        Returns:
        The tint color used when this image is selected/hovered

      • setScale

        void setScale​(float scale)
        Sets the render scale of this image.
        Parameters:
        scale - The scale factor (default 1.0)

      • getScale

        float getScale()
        Returns:
        The render scale of this image

      • setAlpha

        void setAlpha​(float alpha)
        Sets the alpha transparency of this image.
        Parameters:
        alpha - The alpha value from 0.0 (transparent) to 1.0 (opaque)

      • getAlpha

        float getAlpha()
        Returns:
        The alpha transparency of this image (0.0 to 1.0)

      • setRotation

        void setRotation​(float rotation)
        Sets the rotation angle of this image.
        Parameters:
        rotation - The rotation in degrees

      • getRotation

        float getRotation()
        Returns:
        The rotation angle of this image in degrees

      • setImageType

        void setImageType​(int imageType)
        Sets the image type which determines where the image is rendered.
        Parameters:
        imageType - The image type: 0 = Default, 1 = Text, 2 = Option

      • getImageType

        int getImageType()
        Returns:
        The image type: 0 = Default, 1 = Text, 2 = Option

      • setAlignment

        void setAlignment​(int alignment)
        Sets the alignment of this image.
        Parameters:
        alignment - The alignment value

      • getAlignment

        int getAlignment()
        Returns:
        The alignment value of this image
